name: Chocolate Pizza
recipeInstructions:
%%%%% CHOCOLATE PIZZA %%%%%
1. Melt 1 cup chocolate chips and 1/2 cup shortening over hot water; cool.
2. Stir in flour, sugar, eggs, and baking powder with a fork until well combined.
3. Spread the batter evenly onto a well-greased 12-inch pizza pan.
4. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
5. Combine 3/4 cup chocolate chips, 2 tbsp shortening, and 2 tbsp water; stir to combine.
6. Spread the glaze evenly over the cooled chocolate pizza.
7. Decorate as desired with candies.
Origin: Five Roses 1991 Calendar for the month of March. Sent by: Sharon Stevens
